LanguageData.RI_Alert_ZombieHungryDesc: Zombie is feeling hungry and needs food!
LanguageData.RI_Alert_ZombieNeedSuppressDesc: The zombie is about to go berserk and needs to be suppressed!
LanguageData.RI_Letter_FleshMutationText: {PAWN_nameDef}'s {1} has been corrupted by the curse, resulting in flesh mutation.
LanguageData.RI_Curse_FirstWarningText:
A curse has appeared on the current map. It can cause colonists to undergo flesh mutation and increases the chance of cursed incidents.

It is recommended to build warding towers as soon as possible, or equip key personnel with protective talismans to reduce the curse's effects.





EVEN IF YOU FLEE ELSEWHERE, WE WILL STILL FIND YOU.
LanguageData.RI_Settings_Curse_HumanButcher: Curse added per human corpse butchered: {0}
